source.name: Chuck E. Cheese's ( Closed 4/1/15 )
source.description:
Decisively closed on April 1st, 2015. This game was originally just a gamification of a now permanently closed store in real life. And i had no intention to make a functioning game out of it rather than a simple experience with additional "job" roleplaying aspects. Because this game no longer represents the former actual location, i have currently decided to have it remain inactive. I sincerely hope you enjoyed visiting my place in the past, i had garnered short-term success during a far simpler time on ROBLOX. Thank you!
• Employee uniform: http://www.roblox.com/CEC-item?id=71399083 
• Group: http://www.roblox.com/My/Groups.aspx?gid=864088 Disclaimer: Not all in-game objects can be interacted with, the reasoning for this is because i initially created the game with very minimal scripting knowledge, as my original concept was to only emphasize visually "accurate" details.

source.name: Roblox Titanic Classic
source.description:
Play the modern Roblox Titanic
https://www.roblox.com/games/294790062/Roblox-Titanic

This game ran its course August 2009 to December 2015. 
Thanks to everyone who played it.  Roblox was just in its infancy and this game has grown along with Roblox.  It was made without a security feature, due to being built before that feature even existed, and Roblox has made it mandatory as of July 2018.

You can actually get to a barebones version of this game by playing Roblox Titanic 2.0 (link above) and finding the option in the lobby gallery hallway.  You will see an option to play Roblox Titanic Classic.  It will not be the same, but you can explore the ship and experience the sinking.

source.name: Flood Escape: Classic
source.description:
Locked in a flooding facility, you and your team must work together to push buttons, find the way out, crack the code and escape before the flood takes you!

Flood Escape Classic started development in September 2011, and is what kickstarted the Flood Escape series.

FEC persisted through many of Roblox's fundamental changes; Mobile Support, Dynamic Lighting, Filtering Enabled and many more.

While the game doesn't get updated often now due to focus on FE2, FEC's continued community and player count shows that the game continues to offer a solid experience for obby enthusiasts.

Flood Escape © Crazyblox Games 2011 - 2024

source.name: Flood Escape: Classic
source.description:
Locked in a flooding facility, you and your team must work together to push buttons, find the way out, crack the code and escape before the flood takes you!

Flood Escape Classic started development in September 2011, and is what kickstarted the Flood Escape series.

FEC persisted through many of Roblox's fundamental changes; Mobile Support, Dynamic Lighting, Filtering Enabled and many more.

While the game doesn't get updated often now due to focus on FE2, FEC's continued community and player count shows that the game continues to offer a solid experience for obby enthusiasts.

Flood Escape © Crazyblox Games 2011 - 2024

source.name: The Stalker: Reborn
source.description:
Update [1/24/2021]
- Enabled shadow-mapped lighting
- Controls should be working for Gamepads & Xbox again.
- Added a red-tinted atmosphere to The Stalker's perspective.
- Mobile users can now use the control scheme of their choice!
- 3D displayed items now use Roblox's ViewportFrame class to be rendered.
- Combines are now more dependent on their flashlights rather than the illuminated environment.

In The Stalker you assume the role of an elite UNIT 8 soldier in a galactic empire. You and your team have been sent to exterminate an "experiment that went horrendously wrong", known as The Stalker. He's a nearly invisible mutant hunchback creature with psychic powers, and he'll stop at nothing to devour you, and the rest of your team. The goal is simple: Kill him or be killed.

source.name: Zombie Tower
source.description:
Things are being worked on. 

For transparency regarding ZT and its future, I’d like to share that the game is currently undergoing a major overhaul. A passionate and talented team has been actively working to improve the game, with the goal of bringing the game back to its former glory. This new foundation is being designed to be far more stable and maintainable than the old decrepit code that contributed to the game's decline. While not everything will be changed, the improvements being made are major, and I have full confidence in the team’s ability to bring you all a proper ZT experience. I’m very excited for both returning and new players to experience ZT in a fresh light and enjoy what’s coming next. Of course, I’ll be assisting throughout as well. I can’t express how grateful I am for this community and the support you've shown over the years. It truly means a lot to see so many people continue to care about and contribute to an old zombie game I created years ago. :')

source.name: Flood Escape: Classic
source.description:
Locked in a flooding facility, you and your team must work together to push buttons, find the way out, crack the code and escape before the flood takes you!

Flood Escape Classic started development in September 2011, and is what kickstarted the Flood Escape series.

FEC persisted through many of Roblox's fundamental changes; Mobile Support, Dynamic Lighting, Filtering Enabled and many more.

While the game doesn't get updated often now due to focus on FE2, FEC's continued community and player count shows that the game continues to offer a solid experience for obby enthusiasts.

Flood Escape © Crazyblox Games 2011 - 2024
